command_eng: When the baby room sound exceeds 40 dB, output "Noise detected in the baby room" through the living room speaker.

args.Text: Noise detected in the baby room

joi_block.name: Scenario
joi_block.script:
wait until((#SoundSensor #BabyRoom).soundSensor_sound > 40)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak("Noise detected in the baby room")

code:
{
  "name": "Scenario",
  "cron": "",
  "period": 0,
  "script": "wait until((#SoundSensor #BabyRoom).soundSensor_sound > 40)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak(\"Noise detected in the baby room\")"
}
